hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ] && exit 0; git add -A && git commit -q -m "auto-save: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push -q origin HEAD; exit 0
